name: Fox Valley
description_short: Fox Valley Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving the Aurora and Oswego, Illinois area with loans, savings accounts, and deposit insurance through NCUA.
description_long:
Fox Valley Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative serving the Fox Valley region of Illinois. The credit union maintains two physical branch locations: one at 575 N. Broadway in Aurora and another at 1 W. Merchants Dr. in Oswego, with phone banking available at (630) 859-2276 and (630) 906-2050 respectively. As a federally chartered credit union, member deposits are protected by NCUA insurance up to $250,000.

Fox Valley offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including vehicle loans, mortgage loans, signature loans, VISA credit cards, and specialized loan products such as credit builder loans, "Grow Your Money" loans, and share-secured loans. Their savings options include regular share savings accounts, share draft checking accounts, money market accounts, IRAs, certificates of deposit, and specialized savings vehicles like Christmas savings accounts. Rates as of April 2026 include auto loans ranging from 4.99% to 18.99% APR, signature loans from 9.99% to 24.99% APR, certificates of deposit up to 1.61% APY, and money market accounts up to 1.41% APY.

Fox Valley distinguishes itself through member-focused products including loan protection options, GAP insurance, mechanical breakdown protection, and member loyalty discounts. The credit union provides digital banking conveniences through online banking, a mobile app, e-statements, and Zelle money transfer capability. Their credit builder loan product specifically serves members looking to establish or improve credit history. The institution maintains extended hours (7:30 am to 12:00 pm based on available information) and follows federal holiday closings.

As a community-focused credit union, Fox Valley serves local residents with competitive rates and personalized service, though membership eligibility requirements may apply. The institution's strength lies in providing traditional credit union benefits including lower loan rates and higher savings rates compared to many commercial banks, alongside a commitment to member education through calculators and financial planning tools.
services: Loan protection insurance (GAP and mechanical breakdown coverage)
Online banking and mobile app access
pros: NCUA deposit insurance protection up to $250,000 for member funds
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.99% APR
Credit builder loan product specifically designed for credit establishment
Multiple loan protection options including GAP insurance and mechanical breakdown coverage
Digital banking services including mobile app, online banking, and Zelle integration
Specialized savings products including Christmas savings and money market accounts
Two convenient branch locations in Aurora and Oswego with extended morning hours
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Fox Valley region of Illinois
Only two physical branch locations may be inconvenient for members outside immediate area
Signature loan rates reach up to 24.99% APR at the higher end, which is substantial
Website content does not clearly specify membership eligibility criteria or joining process details
Limited information available regarding small dollar emergency loans or quick cash products
best_for: Illinois residents in Aurora and Oswego seeking competitive vehicle financing with NCUA protection
Credit-building consumers looking for specialized credit builder loan products
Borrowers seeking mortgage financing with community-based credit union service and personalized attention
diagnosis: Fox Valley Credit Union is best for Illinois residents in the Aurora and Oswego area seeking competitive member-owned banking with federal deposit insurance and credit-building products. The main caveat is the limited geographic footprint—membership is restricted to the Fox Valley region, making this institution impractical for consumers outside this Illinois service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Fox Valley — Credit Union in Aurora, IL | CreditDoc
meta_description: Fox Valley — NCUA-insured credit union in Aurora, IL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
